justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions and adjusted its search window appropriately.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered relevant alternative slots when the user's preferred times were unavailable, leading to a successful booking.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and made appropriate tool calls without unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment.
